summary: Testing completed for Reset All and Scale button bug fixes. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Reset button verified working - correctly resets frequency to 27.185 default. Scale modal opens correctly. Factory defaults confirmed: reflector=216", driven=204", spacing=48", freq=27.185 MHz, gamma feed, bonded boom mount.

ui_bugs.issue: Tutorial modal appears on login and overlays other modals (Scale modal), making interaction difficult

critical_code_review_comments: handleRefresh() function (lines 592-664) correctly resets ALL state variables to factory defaults including: inputs, spacing state, locks, gamma match settings, hairpin settings, coax/power settings, and clears results

scaleDesignToFrequency() function (lines 1285-1369) correctly scales ALL parameters: element lengths, element positions (spacings), taper sections, stacking spacing, height, spacing overrides, boom lock length, gamma settings (barPos, rodInsertion, tubeLength, rodSpacing), hairpin settings (length, rodSpacing, boomGap)
Factory defaults confirmed correct: 2 elements (reflector 216" at pos 0, driven 204" at pos 48"), freq 27.185 MHz, band 11m_cb, feed_type gamma, boom_mount bonded

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Reset verified working, Scale modal UI verified, tutorial modal overlay issue noted

seed_data_creation: None - tests use inline payload data with default 2-element Yagi configuration
